update.releaseNotes:
Version 3.5.0.4 Release Notes:
✨ New Features: - Added BORONGAN SALES CENTER and GUIUAN SALES CENTER to all export modules - Expanded sales center support across CCS, DSRR, and main forms
🐛 Bug Fixes: - Fixed auto-detection for newly added sales centers (BORONGAN & GUIUAN) - Corrected folder name mapping to properly detect sales centers from folder paths
🔧 Improvements: - Enhanced CCSExporter with robust error handling and exception management - Improved filename sanitization using GUID-based unique naming to prevent file conflicts - Implemented STA thread validation for Excel COM interop - Added thread-safe progress reporting with SynchronizationContext marshaling - Robustified COM object cleanup with proper reference counting - Better validation of input parameters in CCSExporter constructor - Explicit database provider fallback (ACE OLEDB to VFP OLEDB) with clear error messaging - Graceful handling of Excel file format specification (xlsx) and border operations
🔐 Code Quality: - Replaced silent exception swallowing with explicit, meaningful exception handling - Added comprehensive validation for product type (LPG vs GASES) - Improved desktop path validation with permission error detection - Enhanced AutoFit and column width operations with error recovery - Better debugging support with detailed exception context
Please update to access the new sales centers and benefit from improved robustness and error handling.
